headline: Two-thirds of Americans think AI is advancing too quickly
summary: Pew Research shows 63% of Americans believe AI is developing too fast. AI chatbot usage has surged since 2024, with 49% now using them occasionally. ChatGPT's usage alone has doubled since 2023, reaching 44%.

headline: The Echo Dot Max is cheaper than ever in an early Prime Day sale
summary: Amazon's Echo Dot Max is on sale for $64.99, a $35 discount. This is an early Prime Day deal, offering the lowest price yet. Many Echo speakers are seeing significant price drops before the event.

headline: Vibe-decoding the White House-Anthropic fight over Fable
summary: A feud between the White House and Anthropic concerning Fable is explored. The column discusses the intersection of technology, politics, and self-interest. It delves into how this conflict could reshape frontier AI development.

headline: Can anyone look cool wearing Snap's $2,000 glasses?
summary: Snap debuted its new $2,195 Specs glasses, developed over 12 years. CEO Evan Spiegel aims to 'bring computing into the world' and make it 'more human.' The article questions the fashion appeal of these expensive smart glasses.

headline: I'm Glad the Ocarina of Time Remake Showed Us Almost Nothing
summary: The author expresses satisfaction with the limited reveal of the Ocarina of Time remake. This approach helps maintain anticipation and surprise for fans. It suggests a preference for experiencing new content firsthand, rather than through extensive previews.

headline: The Complete Calvin and Hobbes Hardcover Book Set Is Already on Sale Ahead of Amazon Prime Day
summary: The complete Calvin and Hobbes hardcover collection is currently on sale. This deal is available ahead of Amazon Prime Day. It's described as the most comprehensive collection of the beloved comic strip.

headline: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Is Up for Preorder, Here's What Comes in Each Edition
summary: Preorders are now live for Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4. Details on what each edition includes are available. The game is set to release on October 23.

headline: The Apple AirPods Pro 3 Earbuds Drops to the Lowest Price Ever Ahead of Father's Day
summary: Apple AirPods Pro 3 are at their lowest price ever on Amazon. The deal offers an $80 saving compared to buying directly from Apple. This early Father's Day sale presents a significant discount.

headline: Iran sends tankers loaded with oil past US military blockade
summary: Three Iranian tankers carrying crude oil navigated past a US blockade. The incident occurred in the Gulf of Oman. Ship-tracking data confirmed the tankers' passage.

headline: PM warns Burnham against immediate leadership challenge if he wins by-election
summary: Keir Starmer cautioned Andy Burnham against an immediate leadership challenge. The warning comes if Burnham wins the Makerfield by-election. Starmer suggests focusing on a subsequent Manchester mayoral race instead.

headline: BBC announces 550 job cuts as first part of £500m savings plan
summary: The BBC announced 550 job cuts as part of a £500m savings initiative. Initial proposals include 200 job losses within the news division. The corporation outlined the plans in an email to its staff.

headline: Israel launches fresh strikes on Lebanon despite Trump criticism
summary: Israel conducted new strikes on Lebanon. The action defies recent criticism from Donald Trump. Trump had urged Israeli PM Netanyahu to be 'more responsible' regarding Lebanon.
